mapper.select: SELECT product_name_raw AS productNameRaw, quantity AS quantity, product_total AS productTotal, unit_price AS unitPrice, shipping_included AS shippingIncluded FROM new_sales_data LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT order_number FROM test_orders ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_sales_data ( order_number, platform, product_name_raw, quantity, product_total, unit_price, shipping_included, order_date ) VALUES ( #{orderNumber}, #{platform}, #{productNameRaw}, #{quantity}, #{productTotal}, #{unitPrice}, #{shippingIncluded}, #{orderDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM test_sales_data WHERE product_id IS NULL ORDER BY id
